name: Italian Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix the vinegar, Worcestershire sauce, oregano, and minced garlic.
2. Pour the mixture over the seasoned meat and diced onion. Cover lightly.
3. Roast at 350 degrees for 3 hours or until the beef is done.
4. Slice the beef when it has cooled.
5. In a separate bowl, combine the sauce ingredients: water, beef bouillon cubes, Worcestershire sauce, oregano, Italian Dressing Mix, basil, and Au Jus Mix. Bring to a boil.
6. Let the sauce cool for 10 minutes before adding the sliced beef.
7. Serve on poorboy buns. May be refrigerated for 2 to 3 weeks. Makes 10 to 16 servings.
